title: Illegal casts not caught
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(a Int32, b String, c Float32, d Date);
INSERT INTO test_table(a, c) VALUES(5, toFloat32('not_a_float'));
INSERT INTO test_table(a, b, c) VALUES(3, NULL, 2.5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a = toInt32('string_instead_of_int');
key_bug_features: Inserting values with incorrect data types
